meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Overcome No Portfolio (Advanced Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about your lack of portfolio. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit strategy with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship revenue-generating apps fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a perception issue, not a skill gap. By deploying a high-velocity SaaS starter kit, you shift focus from 'past experience' to 'live product results.' Use Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for iterative execution to launch a functional, monetizable MVP in under 48 hours.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank portfolio is deafening when you are staring down high-ticket clients. You know you have the engineering chops, but the market demands proof—a trail of shipped code and recurring revenue. You are trapped in the 'no work to show' loop, where every potential lead evaporates the moment they ask for a case study.

But the game has changed. You don't need a decade of agency work; you need a high-octane SaaS starter kit that turns your technical intuition into a live, scalable product. By leveraging AI-native development tools, you can bypass the grunt work and ship a production-ready application that speaks louder than any resume ever could.

steps.title: Define the High-Value SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using a modern stack (Next.js, Supabase, Stripe). Focus on authentication, billing, and database schema before writing a single line of feature code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Lead SaaS Architect. Generate a boilerplate architecture for a B2B SaaS application using Next.js 14, Supabase for auth/DB, and Stripe integration. Include a folder structure optimized for modular feature development.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Stop writing manual SQL. Use your starter kit's schema generator to define your entities and let Claude handle the migration scripts to ensure data integrity from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a database schema for a SaaS user profile, subscription tier, and project usage logs. Ensure RLS policies follow the principle of least privilege.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate migration files for the new user and subscription tables'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Revenue Hooks
steps.description: Monetization is the primary differentiator. Integrate Stripe Webhooks to handle subscription lifecycle events so your app becomes a revenue engine immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route handler for Stripe webhooks that updates user subscription status in Supabase when a checkout session completes.

steps.title: Ship the Core Value Proposition
steps.description: Build the specific feature that solves the user's problem. Use Claude Code to rapidly iterate on the UI components while keeping the business logic decoupled.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular dashboard component that displays real-time analytics based on the user's project activity stored in Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude build 'create a dashboard component with shadcn UI and supabase data fetching'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Move from local dev to a live URL. Ensure your environment variables are secured and your CI/CD pipeline is active for instant updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for production readiness including Vercel deployment, environment variable sanitization, and error logging setup.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time to Revenue' over 'Feature Completeness'—ship the payment flow before the dashboard.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your billing logic; it prevents catastrophic revenue bugs.
Build 'in public' by sharing your commit history or build logs; this acts as a surrogate portfolio.
Always modularize your business logic into service layers to allow for easy pivoting when user feedback arrives.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation as you code, ensuring your project looks enterprise-ready from day one.
content.next_steps: Now that your MVP is live, focus on acquiring your first five beta users. Use their feedback to iterate with Claude Code and validate your market fit before scaling your marketing efforts.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of portfolio hold you back from high-ticket SaaS success. Use this blueprint to build, ship, and monetize while others are still updating their resumes. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
